title: Swifty
writer: Roger Allman, Bennett Cohen, Walter Farrar
actors: Hoot Gibson, June Gale, George 'Gabby' Hayes
plot: Swifty is framed for the murder of Alec MeNiel by the Lawyer Cheevers and the stepson Price. Then they incite the locals to form a lynch mob, but Swifty has an unexpected ally in the Sheriff who knows Price was after his stepfathe...
